title: Capstone: A Basin's Water Story
description: Synthesis capstone for the Intro to Hydrology course. Choose one of four curated basins (or any USGS gauge), fetch a 10-year streamflow record, compute hydrological signatures (BFI, FDC), run a TWI terrain analysis, then narrate the basin's water story through a 6-stage interactive timeline. Generates a structured text report you can export.

citation.text: Addor, N. et al. (2017). The CAMELS data set: catchment attributes and meteorology for large-sample studies. Hydrol. Earth Syst. Sci., 21, 5293–5313.

author: Mohammad Galib, Purdue University
